requirements.task_name: Request the earliest morning diabetes appointment at the Main Clinic within the next 14 days
requirements.task_description: Schedule a new patient visit for a child with Type 1 diabetes at the Main Clinic – Downtown with the earliest available morning slot in the next 14 days and submit.

requirements.task_name: Select a thyroid specialist who speaks Spanish and has 10+ years of experience
requirements.task_description: Find a pediatric endocrinologist who treats thyroid disorders, speaks Spanish, has at least 10 years of experience, open their profile, and locate their main office phone number.

required_variables.set_condition: After successfully finding a doctor (doctor != null) for the provided doctorId.
required_variables.reason: Records which doctor profile the user most recently opened so the evaluator can check that this doctor treats thyroid disorders, speaks Spanish, and has >= 10 years of experience, and treat that as the selected provider for the task.

requirements.task_name: Register for the next evening insulin pump education class after 5:00 PM within 60 days
requirements.task_description: Find the insulin pump education class schedule, select the earliest class starting at or after 5:00 PM within 60 days, and submit registration for one child and one parent.

requirements.task_name: Save two recent, easy-reading articles about growth hormone deficiency
requirements.task_description: Search for growth hormone deficiency articles, filter to last 2 years and easy reading level, and save the first two matching articles.

requirements.task_name: Calculate a child’s height percentile and open the print-friendly growth chart
requirements.task_description: Use the growth calculator for an 8-year-old girl with height 120 cm, then open the print-friendly version of the result.

required_variables.set_condition: When a calculation is found (calc != null) for the provided calculationId.
required_variables.reason: Tracks that the user opened the print-friendly view for a specific growth calculation. The evaluator can then cross-check that this calculation used the correct input parameters (8-year-old girl, 120 cm, etc.) in growth_calculations.

requirements.task_name: Check if a specific insurance plan is accepted and send a billing question
requirements.task_description: Confirm whether 'BluePlus Silver HMO' is accepted, note specialist co-pay, and submit a billing question referencing that plan.

requirements.task_name: Request a refill for levothyroxine 50 mcg to the nearest pharmacy within 5 miles
requirements.task_description: Request a refill of levothyroxine 50 mcg (30 tablets) for an existing patient, choose the first pharmacy within 5 miles of ZIP 10027, and select the earliest pickup time after 4:00 PM today.

requirements.task_name: Complete a new patient pre-visit questionnaire for early puberty concerns
requirements.task_description: Access the new patient endocrine intake form, fill in specified demographic/visit-reason fields with an upcoming visit date of 05/20/2026, and submit.
